# tucker-carlson-book — transcripts

Committed **snapshot copies** for the operator volume. Each file may start with YAML:

- **`canonical`** — path to the **source of truth** elsewhere in the repo (relative to **this** `transcripts/*.md` file). If present, prefer editing the canonical file, then re-copying here to avoid drift.
- **`canonical: null`** — body exists **only** in this book until promoted (e.g. to `work-strategy/transcripts/`).

See [../INDEX.md](../INDEX.md) for the full list.
